title: Literature review on engineering surface modeling
author: Ma, Li

steps.title: Methodology
steps.instruction: Any reconstruction method has to target a set of topographic statistical parameters, and the specified topographic parameters are used as reconstruction targets. The classical random field reconstruction model considers that the topography can be completely determined by the height distribution and autocorrelation function, so the goal is to reconstruct the surface with the specified height distribution parameters and autocorrelation function.
